spider_strategy.pagination: not requested; next page href pattern observed as /shizheng/list_2.html
notes: decision: Tier B — list content is present in the initial server-rendered HTML document and no browser-only list token or JSON list API was observed in CDP network logs.
DOM-only: the list can be extracted directly from main.list-page without executing page interactions.
featured item uses .first-news and does not expose publish time on the list page; regular list items are under .list-page-box .news-page > .media.
observed XHRs only hit /ajax/ for paper image / click tracking and are not the news list source.
